title: pleurogyne stelleriana
intro: Pleurogyne stelleriana, also known as Steller's beaked valerian, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Pacific coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a sedative and antispasmodic, due to its high concentration of valerenic acid. The health benefits of Pleurogyne stelleriana include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, making it a valuable herbal remedy for promoting relaxation and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of Pleurogyne stelleriana can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support the nervous system and promote a restful night's sleep.
